arts.sum: Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ao Tanaka, Joe Rothwell; Daniel James, Brenden Aaronson, Wilfried Gnonto; Joel Piroe. Wilfried Gnonto and Daniel James traded starts earlier this week, while Solomon was given the full 90 minutes on Wednesday ahead of this expected rotation.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player braced for disappointing Farke news ahead of Blackburn trip
arts.sum: Joe Rodon and Wilfried Gnonto are on four yellows apiece and will be banned for one match if they pick up another caution today. Junior Firpo and Jayden Bogle may have got theirs out of the way, but Leeds have another two players trying to inch across the five-yellow suspension tightrope towards December 7.

arts.ttl: Player’s Leeds United exit ‘could be completed’ in January – Club ready to ‘dig deep into pockets’
arts.sum: Red Bull Salzburg have a ‘strong interest’ in bringing Leeds United’s Maximilian Wöber back to the club in the winter market. That’s according to Salzburger Nachrichten, who state the Austrian side will try again after a failed attempt in the summer. arts.sum: Leeds United are in the picture to sign FC Nordsjælland’s Daniel Svensson and could even have an advantage over Liverpool and Juventus. This was initially reported by Fotboll Direkt last weekend, and they stated the Whites are following the 22-year-old. arts.ttl: Chris Wilder repeats Leeds United point after Sheffield United's return to top spot
arts.sum: “I said it when we played Leeds, if you keep turning the ball over then, no matter what formation, what system you play, you allow good players to counter on you and turn the tide. I've got to say it was a tight game, even before the game I was hugely impressed with them and their start, they've got a lot of good players right the way through the team.
